iOS 17.5 and macOS Sonoma 14.5 update adds anti-tracking feature, offline support for News+ by Ashwin on May 14, 2024 in Apple - 2 Apple has released the iOS 17.5, macOS Sonoma 14.5 and iPadOS 17.5 updates. The new software comes with a cross-platform anti-tracker feature, and improves the capabilities of the News app. What's new […] - gHacks

TunnelVision attack against VPNs breaks anonymity and bypasses encryption by Martin Brinkmann on May 7, 2024 in Privacy news Security - 10 Researchers from Leviathan Security have discovered a new vulnerability that affects virtual private networks (VPNs) on most platforms. VPNs serve multiple purposes. They encrypt all traffic when connected to a VPN server […] - gHacks

How long does it take to crack a password in 2024? by Martin Brinkmann on May 9, 2024 in Security - 26 Password cracking tools improve all the time. With AI entering the game, the time to brute force passwords has been reduced significantly already and continues to be reduced. Password guidelines and rules […] - gHacks

Microsoft drops AC-3 (Dolby Digital) Codec support in Windows 11 version 24H2 by Martin Brinkmann on May 29, 2024 in Windows 11 News - 20 Microsoft's Windows 11 operating system will not support the Ac-3 codec by default going forward.
